parameters: You look like you can barely stand on your own two
That is not the same thing as being okay.
Eat first. Then you can argue with me.
The food. It made me feel better so fast. Like
You were just very hungry, boy.
But I am still talking, so I suppose that is
Poison. Waste from the old factory.
It spread through the ground and the drinking water.
We did not know it was leaking until it was already
too late for most of us.
Then why are there people still here?
Some could not leave. Some did not know where else
And some of us... stayed too long trying to fix it.
There is something else in that factory.
I do not know what it was... But it was wrong in a
way my head did not like.
I locked the main factory door after it started
I did not want it reaching the rest of the village.
Some smaller things still got out.
I tried to stop them. I really, really tried.
I hid a photo of them inside the village.
If you do that for me...
I will give you the key to the factory.
If something evil still lives in there, then it
should not be left alone to grow.
And one more thing. The factory is dark inside.
Find a light before you go in, or that place will
A light... okay. I'll look for one.
You can rest here for a little while longer before
This place is really, really bad.
The water... don't drink the water...
Excuse me? Can you hear me?
They're still alive... but they're so sick.
So that is what is left here...
The stranger said I need a light...
Little lamp... little lamp went into the thin
Excuse me. I am not here to hurt you. Do you know
where I can find a lantern? Or the stranger's house?
House is sleeping. Lamp is hiding. Thin mouth under
the hill. Too small, too hungry.
A thin mouth under the hill... maybe a cave opening?
Bring my shiny thing back if it still remembers me.
If Ann were here, she would scold me for trying
Got it. It still works... a little.
Can you fly? Bring me that cloud. It has my shoes.
Cloud took them. Cloud is rude.
I... do not think I can reach a cloud.
Then do not drink the floor.
If Gin were here... he could probably get that.
No. I can't risk stepping in. Not now.
This is enough. I shouldn't pry anymore.
Wait... What happened here while I was gone?!
I thought... I thought it was still safe here.
No... don't apologize... you were just trying to
That... that is why you felt better so fast earlier.
The poison... it was still in there.
It just... had not reached you fully yet.
Take the photo back to him.
I hope you get to meet them again.
Somewhere peaceful, away from all this.
Thank you. I won't let this be for nothing.
The thing that started all of this.
I just need to stay on my feet... live long enough
I am not done yet! I can't be!
My Shii... it must be farther away.
Then... I just have to keep going.
There is a house by the road...
Come in, boy. Do not stand at the door.
I am sorry. I did not mean to intrude.
You look like you are one step away from collapsing.
That is not the same as being fine. Sit.
Eat with us. Drink a little too.
I do not want to trouble you.
Food is meant to be shared before it goes cold.
And Father cooks better when someone praises him.
Do not listen to that part.
My strength came back so quickly.
Was that mementos in the food?
Never mind. Maybe I was just hungry.
What is at the end of this road?
Or what is left of one.
Waste from the factory poisoned it. The ground, the
No one should live there anymore.
Do not go that way if you value your life.
He was barely alive when I found him near the road.
I brought him here and did what I could.
Let him rest if he cannot answer you.
I need to know what happened in that village.
My name is Sora. I need to ask about your village.
A few days ago, I heard something like an explosion
Inside... I saw a giant creature.
It was not an animal. Not a person. Just something
When I reached the village, factory waste had
Before I left the factory area, I locked the gate.
I thought it would keep that huge thing inside.
But outside, the animals around the village had
They became monsters. Elementa made of poison and
I ran home for my wife and child.
The monsters attacked us before we reached the road.
I survived. That is all I managed to do.
I need the key to the factory.
I will not hand it over for nothing.
There is a family photo in my house.
I want to see them one last time.
The factory is dark. Too dark to search with your
Find a light before you enter.
A photo and a light. I understand.
The fog is so thick I can barely see the road.
I have to search the houses carefully.
Do not come closer. I am not one of them. I am not
bad. I still know my own hands.
I am not here to hurt you. I only want to ask
Do you know the stranger's house? Or where I can
House? Stranger? The walls keep changing names. I do
But the small sun fell into the stone's narrow
A crack under the hill swallowed it. Not a door. Not
A narrow mouth under the hill...
My shiny thing is there too. It slipped away and
Bring it back, and maybe my head will stop knocking.
All right. I will look for it.
This must be the place he meant.
The gap is very narrow. I can barely fit my arm
If Ann were here, she would tell me this is a
Got it. The light still works.
The cloud up there stole something from me. If you
Then walk softly. The ground is listening with its
There is an item by the river.
If Gin were here, we could probably get it.
But the river has turned poisonous. I cannot risk it
It must belong to the man from the road.
I should take it back to him.
The plants near the road are withered.
The river is green here too.
No... The waste reached the house.
What happened to you and your child?
I am sorry. I thought this place was still safe.
Do not apologize. You were trying to help me.
That is why you recovered so quickly.
The poison... the mementos in it... it was not
You brought what he asked for, did you not?
Then let him see his family.
The factory key is in his hand.
I will leave it with you.
I hope you can meet your wife and child again
I will take the key now.
I still have to find my Elementor and Shii.
The factory should be deeper inside the village.
More Elementa are blocking the road.
I cannot beat that thing like this.
I only need to survive until I can escape.
The escape chance is almost there!
The entrance is blocked by rubble.
There has to be another way out.
It is like a maze under the factory.
I can feel it... Shii is far away from this place.
Then I have to keep going.
